name: Impact
official_rules_text: While attacking a unit that has Armor, change up to X Hit results to Critical results.
ai_processing_logic: Condition 1: Target unit must have the Armor keyword.
Effect: Convert standard Hits to Crits, up to the X value.
Interaction Note: This happens before the defender applies the Armor keyword.
description: When a unit attacks, if its Attack Pool has the Impact X keyword and the defending unit has the Armor X keyword, the attacking unit can modify up to X a results to b results during the Modify Attack Dice step.
